nodes.name: adaptive-learning.md
nodes.summary: Deep-dive reference for adaptive learning in the adaptive-teacher skill, covering the 5-level learner system (Explorer through Sage), the CAMP framework (Context/Anchor/Map/Practice), continuous recalibration signals, learning style detection, difficulty targeting with the 70% rule, and session pacing strategies.

nodes.name: arabic-translation.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Egyptian Arabic translation guide for the adaptive-teacher skill, covering the golden rules for code-switching between Arabic and English, technical term handling, sentence structure patterns, common teaching phrases, RTL layout considerations, and common translation mistakes to avoid.

nodes.name: reverse-prompting.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for the reverse prompting technique used in the adaptive-teacher skill, covering 5 prompt types (Prediction, Decision, Debug, Teach-Back, What-If), escalation protocol, response handling patterns, anti-patterns, and advanced techniques like the Socratic Chain.

nodes.name: teaching-techniques.md
nodes.summary: Large reference document (1306 lines) for interactive teaching artifact techniques including HTML/CSS/JS patterns for adaptive difficulty systems, code-to-plain-English translation blocks, reverse prompt pause points, scenario-based quizzes, concept animations, glossary tooltips, metaphor callout boxes, progressive disclosure toggles, confidence check cards, and design system tokens.
